title: Agile Retrospective Board
description: Run a team retrospective in minutes — classic went well / didn't go well / action items format
viralHook: Teams that run regular retros ship 2x faster — this board takes under 15 minutes to run

columns.title: What Went Well
columns.description: Celebrate wins and things to keep doing
columns.placeholder: e.g. Daily syncs felt focused and productive

cards.content: Deployment pipeline worked flawlessly this sprint
cards.author: Team

cards.content: Clear requirements from product made scoping easy
cards.author: Team

cards.content: Pair programming sessions caught bugs early
cards.author: Team

columns.title: What Didn't Go Well
columns.description: Identify pain points and areas to improve
columns.placeholder: e.g. Too many context switches disrupted deep work

cards.content: PR review turnaround was too slow — some PRs waited 2+ days
cards.author: Team

cards.content: Scope creep in the middle of the sprint caused stress
cards.author: Team

cards.content: Missing documentation made onboarding the new service painful
cards.author: Team

columns.title: Action Items
columns.placeholder: e.g. @alex to set up PR review SLA of 24 hours

cards.content: Set a 24-hour PR review SLA and add to team working agreement
cards.author: Team

cards.content: Add a scope-freeze date 3 days into each sprint
cards.author: Team

cards.content: Create runbook for the new payments service
cards.author: Team
